heading: Rented quarters
label: 559 Rented quarters
text: Where any office, bureau, or branch of the public service transferred to the Department of Labor by this Act is occupying rented buildings or premises, it may continue to do so until other suitable quarters are provided for its use.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to sections 2, 551, and 555 to 562 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Mar. 4, 1913, ch. 14137 Stat. 736
